findings.title: Same-market self-liquidation of a freshly opened position can over-credit collateral and drain the pool

best_agent_match.title: Liquidation accepts the same market as both debt and collateral

rejected_candidates.title: Liquidation appears to succeed without a real shortfall
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into F-001. The lack of a genuine shortfall is part of the same same-market self-liquidation exploit path, not a distinct issue.

rejected_candidates.title: Borrowers can liquidate their own positions and internalize liquidation incentives
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into F-001. Self-liquidation is one required condition of the broader liquidation-accounting flaw rather than a separate reportable bug on this record.
